framework.name: CFCS Cybersecurity Guidelines
framework.scope: Cybersecurity guidelines for Danish government authorities and critical infrastructure operators
framework.structure_description: Guidelines organized by security domain: network security, identity management, logging and monitoring, incident management, secure development, security architecture, personnel security, and continuity.

controls.title: Network segmentation
controls.description: The organization must segment networks into security zones based on classification and risk. Critical systems must be isolated from the general office network.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal segmentere netvaerk i sikkerhedszoner baseret pa klassifikation og risiko. Kritiske systemer skal vaere isoleret fra det generelle kontornetvaerk.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer VLAN-segmentering og firewall-regler mellem zoner. Dokumenter netvaerksarkitekturen.

controls.title: Micro-segmentation of critical systems
controls.description: Critical systems and databases must be protected with micro-segmentation so that communication is only permitted from authorized sources.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske systemer og databaser skal beskyttes med mikrosegmentering, sa kommunikation kun er tilladt fra autoriserede kilder.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend host-baserede firewalls eller SDN-baseret mikrosegmentering for servere med folsomme data.

controls.title: Firewall configuration and hardening
controls.description: All firewalls must be configured following the principle of least privilege. Only necessary traffic may be allowed.
controls.description_nl: Alle firewalls skal konfigureres efter princippet om mindste rettigheder. Kun nodvendig trafik ma tillades.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer default-deny politikker. Gennemga firewallregler mindst halvarsligt.

controls.title: Centralized firewall management
controls.description: Firewalls must be managed centrally with logging of all rule changes and the ability to quickly deploy emergency rules.
controls.description_nl: Firewalls skal administreres centralt med logning af alle regelaendringer og mulighed for hurtig udrulning af noedregler.

controls.title: Secure remote access via VPN
controls.description: Remote access to the organization network must use an encrypted VPN connection with multi-factor authentication.
controls.description_nl: Fjernadgang til organisationens netvaerk skal ske via krypteret VPN-forbindelse med flerfaktorautentifikation.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend IPsec eller WireGuard VPN. Krav om MFA for alle fjernadgangsbrugere.

controls.title: Remote access session management
controls.description: Remote access sessions must have automatic timeout and re-authentication after a defined period of inactivity.
controls.description_nl: Fjernadgangssessioner skal have automatisk timeout og genautentifikation efter en defineret inaktivitetsperiode.

controls.title: DNS security and filtering
controls.description: The organization must implement DNS security measures including DNSSEC validation and filtering of known malicious domains.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal implementere DNS-sikkerhedsforanstaltninger, herunder DNSSEC-validering og filtrering af kendte ondsindede domaener.
controls.implementation_guidance: Konfigurer DNS-resolvere med DNSSEC-validering. Implementer DNS-filtrering via threat intelligence feeds.

controls.title: Wireless network security
controls.description: Wireless networks must use WPA3 or equivalent encryption. Guest networks must be separated from internal networks.
controls.description_nl: Tradlose netvaerk skal anvende WPA3 eller tilsvarende kryptering. Gaestenetvaerk skal vaere separeret fra interne netvaerk.
controls.implementation_guidance: WPA3-Enterprise med RADIUS-autentifikation for virksomhedsnetvaerk.

controls.title: DDoS protection
controls.description: The organization must have DDoS protection for internet-facing services and a contingency plan for DDoS attacks.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have DDoS-beskyttelse for internetvendte tjenester og en beredskabsplan for DDoS-angreb.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer anti-DDoS tjenester hos ISP eller cloud-udbyder. Test beredskabsplanen arligt.

controls.title: Traffic monitoring and anomaly detection
controls.description: Network traffic must be monitored continuously to identify unusual patterns that may indicate attacks or unauthorized access.
controls.description_nl: Netvaerkstrafik skal overrages kontinuerligt for at identificere usoedvanlige moenstre der kan indikere angreb eller uautoriseret adgang.

controls.title: Email security and anti-phishing
controls.description: The organization must implement SPF, DKIM, and DMARC for all email domains as well as advanced anti-phishing filtering.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal implementere SPF, DKIM og DMARC for alle e-mail-domaener samt avanceret anti-phishing-filtrering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Konfigurer DMARC med p=reject politik. Implementer sandboxing af vedhaeeftede filer.

controls.title: Multi-factor authentication
controls.description: All users must use multi-factor authentication (MFA) when accessing the organization systems and data.
controls.description_nl: Alle brugere skal anvende flerfaktorautentifikation (MFA) ved adgang til organisationens systemer og data.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer MFA med hardware-tokens eller autentifikationsapps. SMS-baseret MFA anses for utilstraekkelig.

controls.title: Phishing-resistant authentication
controls.description: For high-risk systems the organization must use phishing-resistant authentication such as FIDO2/WebAuthn.
controls.description_nl: For systemer med hoej risiko skal organisationen anvende phishing-resistent autentifikation sasom FIDO2/WebAuthn.

controls.title: Privileged access management (PAM)
controls.description: Privileged accounts must be managed separately with time-limited access, session monitoring, and automatic credential rotation.
controls.description_nl: Privilegerede konti skal administreres saerskilt med tidsbegraeenset adgang, sessionovervagning og automatisk rotation af adgangskoder.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer PAM-loesning med just-in-time adgangsforvaltning.

controls.title: Separate administrator accounts
controls.description: Administrative tasks must be performed with dedicated administrator accounts that are separate from users daily accounts.
controls.description_nl: Administrative opgaver skal udfoeres med dedikerede administratorkonti der er adskilt fra brugernes daglige konti.

controls.title: Role-based access control
controls.description: Access to systems and data must be granted based on the user role and following the principle of least privilege.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til systemer og data skal tildeles baseret pa brugerens rolle og efter princippet om mindste rettigheder.
controls.implementation_guidance: Definer roller og tilknyttede rettigheder. Gennemga adgangstildelinger kvartalsmaeessigt.

controls.title: Automatic deprovisioning
controls.description: When an employee leaves or changes role, all access rights must be automatically revoked or adjusted.
controls.description_nl: Nar en medarbejder fratreeder eller skifter rolle, skal alle adgangsrettigheder automatisk tilbagekaldes eller justeres.

controls.title: User account management
controls.description: There must be a formal process for creating, modifying, and deleting user accounts with approval from the responsible manager.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere en formel proces for oprettelse, aendring og sletning af brugerkonti med godkendelse fra den ansvarliges leder.

controls.title: Access review
controls.description: All user accesses must be reviewed at least semi-annually to ensure that rights remain necessary and appropriate.
controls.description_nl: Alle brugeradgange skal gennemgas mindst halvarsligt for at sikre, at rettigheder fortsat er nodvendige og passende.

controls.title: Central log collection
controls.description: All security-relevant log events must be collected centrally in a SIEM system or equivalent log collection solution.
controls.description_nl: Alle sikkerhedsrelevante loghaendelser skal indsamles centralt i et SIEM-system eller tilsvarende logindsamlingsloesning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer centralt SIEM med logindsamling fra alle kritiske systemer.

controls.title: Structured log format
controls.description: Log events must use a standardized and structured format that enables automated analysis and correlation.
controls.description_nl: Loghaendelser skal anvende et standardiseret og struktureret format der muliggor automatisk analyse og korrelation.

controls.title: Real-time security monitoring
controls.description: The organization must have capacity for real-time security monitoring, either internally or via an external SOC service.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have kapacitet til sikkerhedsovervagning i realtid, enten internt eller via en ekstern SOC-tjeneste.
controls.implementation_guidance: Etabler SOC-funktion med 24/7 overvagning af kritiske systemer.

controls.title: Correlation and threat analysis
controls.description: Log data must be correlated across systems to identify advanced threats and attack patterns.
controls.description_nl: Logdata skal korreleres pa tvares af systemer for at identificere avancerede trusler og angrebsmoenstre.

controls.title: Automatic alerting
controls.description: Critical security events must trigger automatic alerts to security personnel with defined escalation deadlines.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske sikkerhedshaendelser skal udloese automatiske alarmer til sikkerhedspersonale med definerede eskaleringsfrister.

controls.title: Alert prioritization and triage
controls.description: Alerts must be prioritized based on risk and impact. There must be clear procedures for triage and follow-up.
controls.description_nl: Alarmer skal prioriteres baseret pa risiko og pavirkning. Der skal vaere klare procedurer for triagering og opfoelgning.

controls.title: Protection of log data against tampering
controls.description: Log data must be protected against unauthorized modification or deletion using write-protected archives and integrity verification.
controls.description_nl: Logdata skal beskyttes mod uautoriseret aendring eller sletning ved brug af skrivebeskyttede arkiver og integritetsverifikation.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend WORM-lagring eller kryptografisk signering af logfiler.

controls.title: Log retention and storage
controls.description: Log data must be retained for at least 12 months in accordance with legal requirements and the organization security policy.
controls.description_nl: Logdata skal opbevares i mindst 12 maneder i henhold til lovkrav og organisationens sikkerhedspolitik.

controls.title: Incident registration and classification
controls.description: All security incidents must be registered in a central system with a defined classification model based on severity.
controls.description_nl: Alle sikkerhedshaendelser skal registreres i et centralt system med en defineret klassifikationsmodel baseret pa alvorsgrad.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer ticketsystem med automatisk klassifikation af haendelsestyper.

controls.title: Incident detection and reporting
controls.description: Employees must be trained to recognize and report security incidents. There must be a clear reporting channel.
controls.description_nl: Medarbejdere skal uddannes i at genkende og rapportere sikkerhedshaendelser. Der skal vaere en klar rapporteringskanal.

controls.title: Escalation procedures
controls.description: There must be clear escalation procedures based on incident severity, including deadlines and responsible roles.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere klare eskaleringsprocedurer baseret pa haendelsens alvorsgrad, inklusiv tidsfrister og ansvarlige roller.

controls.title: Reporting to CFCS
controls.description: Critical security incidents in government authorities and critical infrastructure must be reported to CFCS within 24 hours.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske sikkerhedshaendelser i statslige myndigheder og kritisk infrastruktur skal rapporteres til CFCS inden for 24 timer.
controls.implementation_guidance: Folg CFCS rapporteringsvejledning. Brug den formelle rapporteringskanal pa cfcs.dk.

controls.title: Crisis communication
controls.description: The organization must have a crisis communication plan for serious security incidents, including internal and external communication.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en plan for krisekommunikation ved alvorlige sikkerhedshaendelser, inklusiv intern og ekstern kommunikation.

controls.title: Coordination with authorities
controls.description: In serious incidents there must be coordination with relevant authorities, including CFCS, the police, and the Data Protection Authority.
controls.description_nl: Ved alvorlige haendelser skal der koordineres med relevante myndigheder, herunder CFCS, politiet og Datatilsynet.

controls.title: Recovery after security incident
controls.description: The organization must have documented procedures for recovery after security incidents, including backup restoration and system verification.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have dokumenterede procedurer for genopretning efter sikkerhedshaendelser, inklusiv backup-gendannelse og systemverifikation.

controls.title: Learning from security incidents
controls.description: After incident handling is complete, an evaluation must be conducted to improve procedures and prevention.
controls.description_nl: Efter afslutning af haendelseshandteringen skal der gennemfores en evaluering med henblik pa forbedring af procedurer og forebyggelse.

controls.title: Secure coding practices
controls.description: All developers must follow the organization guidelines for secure coding, including input validation, output encoding, and error handling.
controls.description_nl: Alle udviklere skal folge organisationens retningslinjer for sikker kodning, herunder input-validering, output-encoding og fejlhandtering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Folg OWASP Secure Coding Practices. Inkluder sikkerhedstraening i onboarding af udviklere.

controls.title: Use of secure libraries and frameworks
controls.title_nl: Brug af sikre biblioteker og frameworks
controls.description: Developers must use approved and up-to-date libraries and frameworks. Third-party components must be scanned for known vulnerabilities.
controls.description_nl: Udviklere skal anvende godkendte og opdaterede biblioteker og frameworks. Tredjepartskomponenter skal scannes for kendte sarbarheder.

controls.title: Security code review
controls.description: All code must undergo a security code review before deployment, either via peer review or automated SAST tools.
controls.description_nl: Al kode skal gennemga en sikkerhedskodegennemgang for idriftsaettelse, enten via peerreview eller automatiserede SAST-vaerktojer.

controls.title: Automatic static code analysis
controls.description: The organization must use automatic SAST tools in the CI/CD pipeline to identify security defects.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal anvende automatiske SAST-vaerktojer i CI/CD-pipelinen til at identificere sikkerhedsfejl.

controls.title: Penetration testing
controls.description: Critical applications and systems must undergo regular penetration testing by qualified testers.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske applikationer og systemer skal underkastes regelmaeessig penetrationstest af kvalificerede testere.
controls.implementation_guidance: Gennemfor arlig penetrationstest af alle internetvendte systemer.

controls.title: Dynamic application testing (DAST)
controls.description: Web applications must be tested with DAST tools to identify runtime vulnerabilities before production deployment.
controls.description_nl: Webapplikationer skal testes med DAST-vaerktojer for at identificere runtime-sarbarheder for produktionsudrulning.

controls.title: Vulnerability scanning and patch management
controls.description: All systems must be scanned regularly for known vulnerabilities. Critical vulnerabilities must be patched within 72 hours.
controls.description_nl: Alle systemer skal scannes regelmaeessigt for kendte sarbarheder. Kritiske sarbarheder skal patches inden for 72 timer.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer ugentlig sarbarhedsscanning. Definer SLA for patching baseret pa CVSS-score.

controls.title: Responsible vulnerability disclosure
controls.description: The organization must have a process for receiving and handling vulnerability reports from external security researchers.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en proces for at modtage og handtere sarbarhedsrapporter fra eksterne sikkerhedsforskere.

controls.title: Zero Trust architecture
controls.description: The organization should move toward a Zero Trust architecture where all access attempts are verified regardless of network location.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal bevaege sig mod en Zero Trust-arkitektur hvor alle adgangsforsoeg verificeres uanset netvaerksplacering.

controls.title: Security architecture documentation
controls.description: The overall security architecture must be documented and kept up to date. Documentation must cover network, data flow, and trust boundaries.
controls.description_nl: Den overordnede sikkerhedsarkitektur skal vaere dokumenteret og holdes opdateret. Dokumentationen skal daekke netvaerk, dataflow og tillidsgraenser.

controls.title: Encryption of data in transit
controls.description: All data communication must be encrypted with TLS 1.2 or newer. Older encryption protocols must be disabled.
controls.description_nl: Al datakommunikation skal krypteres med TLS 1.2 eller nyere. Aeldre krypteringsprotokoller skal deaktiveres.
controls.implementation_guidance: Konfigurer webservere og API-endpoints med TLS 1.2+ og staerke ciphersuites.

controls.title: Encryption of data at rest
controls.description: Sensitive data must be encrypted when stored on disk, in databases, and on backup media.
controls.description_nl: Folsomme data skal krypteres nar de opbevares pa disk, i databaser og i backup-medier.

controls.title: Key management
controls.description: Encryption keys must be generated, stored, and rotated in accordance with the organization encryption policy.
controls.description_nl: Krypteringsnoegler skal genereres, opbevares og roteres i overensstemmelse med organisationens krypteringspolitik.

controls.title: System hardening
controls.description: All systems must be hardened according to the organization hardening guides based on CIS Benchmarks or equivalent.
controls.description_nl: Alle systemer skal haerdes i henhold til organisationens haerdningsguider baseret pa CIS Benchmarks eller tilsvarende.

controls.title: Secure configuration management
controls.description: System configurations must be managed centrally with version control and automatic compliance checking.
controls.description_nl: Systemkonfigurationer skal styres centralt med versionsstyring og automatisk compliance-kontrol.

controls.title: Backup and recovery
controls.description: The organization must have a backup strategy with regular testing of recovery procedures. Backups must be stored offline or air-gapped.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en backup-strategi med regelmaeessig test af gendannelsesprocedurer. Backups skal opbevares offline eller air-gapped.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer 3-2-1 backup-strategi. Test gendannelse kvartalsmaeessigt.

controls.title: Security awareness training
controls.description: All employees must complete annual security awareness training covering phishing, social engineering, and data hygiene.
controls.description_nl: Alle medarbejdere skal gennemfore arlig sikkerhedsbevidsthedstraening der daekker phishing, social engineering og datahygiejne.
controls.implementation_guidance: Gennemfor kvartalsvis phishing-simulation og arlig sikkerhedstraening.

controls.title: Specialized security training for IT staff
controls.description: IT staff with security responsibilities must receive specialized technical security training and certification.
controls.description_nl: IT-personale med sikkerhedsansvar skal modtage specialiseret teknisk sikkerhedstraening og certificering.

controls.title: Security screening at employment
controls.description: The hiring process must include security screening proportional to the level of access to sensitive systems and data.
controls.description_nl: Ansaettelsesprocessen skal inkludere sikkerhedsscreening proportional med adgangsniveauet til folsomme systemer og data.

controls.title: Terms of employment and confidentiality agreements
controls.description: All employees must sign confidentiality agreements specifying their responsibilities for information security.
controls.description_nl: Alle medarbejdere skal underskrive fortrolighedsaftaler der specificerer deres ansvar for informationssikkerhed.

controls.title: IT contingency plan
controls.description: The organization must have a documented IT contingency plan that ensures continued operations or rapid recovery in case of serious IT incidents.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en dokumenteret IT-beredskabsplan der sikrer fortsat drift eller hurtig genopretning ved alvorlige IT-haendelser.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dokumenter RTO og RPO for alle kritiske systemer. Test planen arligt.

controls.title: Contingency exercises
controls.description: Contingency plans must be tested at least annually through exercises that simulate realistic scenarios.
controls.description_nl: Beredskabsplaner skal testes mindst arligt gennem oeevelser der simulerer realistiske scenarier.

controls.title: Business impact analysis
controls.description: The organization must conduct a Business Impact Analysis (BIA) to identify critical business processes and their dependence on IT systems.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal gennemfore en Business Impact Analyse (BIA) for at identificere kritiske forretningsprocesser og deres afhaengighed af IT-systemer.
